LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO THE OCT-17-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AND OF NONAPPEARANCE; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. WELLS FARGO IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT OLGA SEBASTIAN IN THE AMOUNT OF $11,272.84. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK; V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/HEK)

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Oct-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Of Nonappearance.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Wells Fargo is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Olga Sebastian in the amount of $11,272.84.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk; V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Jun-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance.

Grant. Court will sign order submitted by counsel.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMT)
